title: cerbera venenifera
intro: Cerbera venenifera, also known as the sea mango or ocean mango, is a plant species native to tropical Asia, particularly in the coastal regions of India, Southeast Asia, and the Pacific Islands. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial activities. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, diarrhea, and skin infections, due to its health benefits in reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. In traditional medicine, cerbera venenifera is prepared into herbal remedies, including infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which are used to treat various ailments and support overall well-being.
